Position Select Position @for (position of filteredPositionList; track position.PositionMasterId) { {{ position.PositionMasterName }} } @if (offerLetterForm.get('OfferLetterPositionId')?.invalid && offerLetterForm.get('OfferLetterPositionId')?.touched) { Position is required }
Recruitment Select Candidate @for (recruitment of filteredRecruitmentList; track recruitment.RecruitmentMasterId) { {{ recruitment.RecruitmentMasterNameOfCandidates }} } @if (offerLetterForm.get('OfferLetterRecruitmentId')?.invalid && offerLetterForm.get('OfferLetterRecruitmentId')?.touched) { Recruitment selection is required }

Recruitment Details
Recruitment Code {{ element.RecruitmentMasterCode }} Candidate Name {{ element.RecruitmentMasterNameOfCandidates }} Position {{ element.RecruitmentMasterPositionName }} Email {{ element.RecruitmentMasterCandidateEmailId }} Contact {{ element.RecruitmentMasterCandidateContactNumber }} Reference Name {{ element.RecruitmentMasterReferenceName }} Reference Code {{ element.RecruitmentMasterReferenceCode }} Job Suitability {{ element.RecruitmentMasterAppropriateForJobRole }} City {{ element.RecruitmentMasterCityName }} Company {{ element.RecruitmentMasterCompanyName }} Interviewer {{ element.RecruiterFullName }} Interviewer Comment {{ element.RecruitmentMasterInterviewerComment }} Grade {{ element.RecruitmentMasterGradeName }} Designation {{ element.RecruitmentMasterDesignationName }} Current CTC ₹{{ element.RecruitmentMasterCurrentCTCPA | number:'1.2-2' }} Expected CTC ₹{{ element.RecruitmentMasterExpectedCTCPA | number:'1.2-2' }} Recommended CTC ₹{{ element.RecruitmentMasterRecommendedCTCPA | number:'1.2-2' }} Expected Joining {{ element.RecruitmentMasterExpectedJoiningDate | date:'dd/MM/yyyy' }} HR Comment {{ element.RecruitmentMasterHrcomment }} Stage Status {{ element.RecruitmentMasterRecruitmentStageStatusName }} Offer Status {{ getOfferLetterStatusText(element.RecruitmentMasterOfferLetterStatus) }} Authorization {{ element.RecruitmentMasterAuth ? 'Authorized' : 'Pending' }} Remarks {{ element.RecruitmentMasterRemark }} Auth Remarks {{ element.RecruitmentMasterAuthRemark }}
